# Calculator

> Evaluates mathematical expressions safely. Supports basic arithmetic (+, -, *, /, %, **) and common math functions (sqrt, sin, cos, tan, log, abs, round, min, max).

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | utility |
| Requires network | no |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| expression | string | yes | - | Mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., '2 + 2', 'sqrt(16)', 'sin(pi/2)') |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "Calculator"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
